svg.title: Sub-D Fitting Bore Array — Engineering Drawing
svg.text: Cartridge Tray — Bore Plate Bosses, Press-Fit Bores, Entry Funnels
Material: PETG | All dimensions in mm | Third-Angle Orthographic Projection

g.text: Scale 12:1 (12 px/mm) — Section through bore axis
1. All bore features integral to tray (Sub-A). Zero additional printed parts.
2. 4 bosses at 20mm c-c merge where they touch (0mm gap). Model as union.
3. Fittings pressed from user side (-Y direction). Hand force sufficient.
4. Entry funnel 45-degree half-angle, self-supporting in print orientation.
5. Press-fit bore 9.5mm for 9.31mm center body = 2.0% circumferential strain.
